title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Cyient Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Cyient Capital India has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cyient Capital India:
Cyient Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cyient Capital India!
